intent: Implement governance invariant I6 (delegation non-escalation) so that no agent can cause another agent to execute capabilities the target does not possess. This is the last unenforced invariant in the formal governance model.
acceptance_criteria: ExecutionGate enforces I6: delegation requests are denied when the requested capability is not in the target agent's effective set
Delegation graph is representable and queryable
Property tests prove I6 holds under module composition
I6 enforcement is logged via DecisionLogger
